title: DIVCHI Round Trash Can Bin - 1 Pack Black Non-Slip Mesh Bins Waste Paper Bin Sturdy Metal Bin Indoor Waste Bin for Home Bedroom Office Bathroom Living Room & Kitchen (Black)
features: MADE OF DURABLE STEEL WIRE MESH: Reinforced with solid metal base and solid edging along bottom and top rim. The lightweight and metallic mesh wastebasket bins are perfect for you to put anywhere you need.

ROUND PAPER BIN: Large, round opening and tapered shape make sure trash goes into the can, not around it; wire mesh bin keeps the wastebasket well-ventilated, preventing the buildup of moisture and smells.

PERFECT FOR ANY ROOM: Ideal for use in the office, kitchen, bathroom, bedroom/dorm room, etc., Furnish every room of your home with a wastebasket, Outfit a new office with a waste bin at every desk; Separate recyclables from trash with multiple baskets. Use them your way.

ATTRACTIVE SMALL METAL BIN FINISH: Constructed from a steel mesh casing in a silver epoxy finish with a reinforced top rim and solid steel base. Epoxy finish is attractive but tough. Round Mesh Waste Bin Size : 27cm x 23.5cm x 19cm.
VENTILATED ROOM BIN DESIGN: The steel mesh bin construction provides for a breathable wastebasket that helps prevent the build-up of moisture. Breathable design prevents odours from building up.
description: Product Description DIVCHI Presents Circular Mesh Wastebasket Trash Can A GREAT ADDITION -- The circular mesh wastebasket trash can waste bin is a great addition to everyday home and office use. Its mesh design adds a warm, contemporary touch to your leaving space. The appearance is very stylish & attractive. STYLISH & MODERN STYLISH & MODERN -- DIVCHI circular waste bin is design with ventilated mesh. These trash bins are stylish and modern contemporary that keep your room tidy and clean. WELL-VENTILATED WELL-VENTILATED -- With great width and length and round opening make sure that the trash goes into the can, not around it; mesh keeps the wastebasket well-ventilated, prevent smell and maintains the hygiene. Attractive Finish & Classic Colors Available in black & silver colour for home offices, dorm rooms uses. BIN FEATURES -- Large, round opening and tapered shape make sure trash goes into the can, not around it; wire mesh keeps the wastebasket well-ventilated, preventing the buildup of moisture and smells. IDEAL FOR -- This waste bin offers excellent value for money. It is ideal for offices, study room, bedrooms and student halls. It is so compact that it can easily be left under your office desk. Multifunctional Dustbin, Ideal for office, kitchen, bathroom, bedroom etc. Best Use For Office Best Use For Office -- Mesh wastebasket offers a sleek classy look to any office. It is a perfect addition to your office to put your dry waste. Perfect For Bathroom Perfect For Bathroom -- This wastebasket is a mesh bin that makes it a perfect addition to your bathroom to put dry waste. Ideal For Use In The Garage Ideal For Use In The Garage -- This mesh wastebasket is ideal for use in the garage. Waste basket is perfect for paper waste and dry garbage. One For Each Room One For Each Room -- Waste basket garbage can bin for every room. Use them in the bedroom, bathroom, and kitchen workshop. Furnish every room of your home with DIVCHI wastebasket The video showcases the product in use. The video guides you through product setup. The video compares multiple products. VENTILATED MESH DESIGN VENTILATED MESH DESIGN -- The mesh construction provides for a breathable wastebasket that helps prevent the build-up of moisture. NON-SLIP BASE NON-SLIP BASE - - This mesh waste paper box has non-slip & stable bottoms that can make the waste paper basket stand stably, not easy to fall or slip. HIGH QUALITY MATERIAL HIGH QUALITY MATERIAL -- Made of durable steel wire mesh; reinforced with solid metal base and solid edging along bottom and top rim BENEFITS OF DIVCHI WASTE BINS BENEFITS OF DIVCHI WASTE BINS -- It will work well for compact size and small homes. Waste bins can last for a long time when used. STYLISH & MODERN -- The stylish and modern designed bin matches any style of room whether in the office, in a store, living room, study, bedroom, kitchen or any part of your home. You may place them in any corner of your house to keep it clean and tidy, available in black and silver colour.
